description_long: This is a single bed with a dark wooden frame featuring both a headboard and a footboard. The bed is topped with a gray, textured blanket that is loosely draped and partially folded back, revealing a matching gray mattress beneath. Two pillows, also gray, are placed at the head of the bed, one resting flat and the other slightly propped up. The frame has a sleek, modern design with clean lines and a low profile, giving it a contemporary urban feel. The bedding appears soft and inviting, contrasting with the hard, polished wood of the frame. The overall appearance suggests comfort and functionality, suitable for a modern apartment or urban loft.
description: A modern single bed with a dark wooden frame, gray bedding, and two pillows, featuring a sleek, low-profile design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the draped blanket, and both pillows at the headboard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the footboard, the blanket's draped edge, and the centered placement of the pillows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blanket's folds and the arrangement of the pillows against the headboard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the headboard, with the blanket and pillows partially visible from behind.
